_**Agent (gpt-5.3-codex 2026-02-18 13:39:58Z)**_

- **High** Breaking change in published API: `packages/rich-renderers/package.json:6` and `packages/rich-renderers/package.json:64` remove the `./slash-menu` subpath from `exports`, so `@shiro/rich-renderers/slash-menu` will stop resolving for existing consumers.
